doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice grants tenants a right to cure by paying rent and requires a court eviction process—so this cannot be genuine HUD/AG guidance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent, and landlords must file and win an eviction lawsuit before tenants can be removed—indicating this is invented, not genuine HUD/AG material.
